Edits are rendered through a noise-aware video diffusion process that enforces spatial and temporal consistency, producing diverse scene variations in a single feed-forward pass without per-trajectory optimization. To standardize evaluation, we further propose HorizonSuite, a comprehensive benchmark spanning ego- and agent-level editing tasks such as trajectory modifications and object manipulation. Extensive experiments show that Gaussian-Mesh representation delivers substantially higher fidelity than alternative 3D representations, and that temporal priors from video diffusion are essential for coherent synthesis. Combining these findings, HorizonForge establishes a simple yet powerful paradigm for photorealistic, controllable driving simulation, achieving an 83.4% user-preference gain and a 25.19% FID improvement over the second best state-of-the-art method. Project page: https://horizonforge.github.io/ .
tldr: HorizonForge introduces a novel framework for controllable driving scene generation using Gaussian Splats and Meshes, combined with a video diffusion process for high photorealism, control, and consistency. It achieves state-of-the-art performance in user preference and FID score, facilitated by a new benchmark, HorizonSuite.
tldr_zh: HorizonForge 提出了一种新颖的驾驶场景生成框架，使用高斯溅射和网格，结合视频扩散过程，以实现高度的逼真度、控制性和一致性。 通过新的基准 HorizonSuite，该方法在用户偏好和 FID 分数方面取得了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 可控的驾驶场景生成对于逼真且可扩展的自动驾驶模拟至关重要，然而，现有方法难以同时实现照片写实度和精确控制。我们引入了HorizonForge，一个统一的框架，将场景重建为可编辑的高斯溅射和网格，从而实现精细的3D操控和语言驱动的车辆插入。编辑通过噪声感知视频扩散过程进行渲染，该过程强制执行空间和时间一致性，在单次前馈过程中生成多样化的场景变体，而无需针对每个轨迹进行优化。为了标准化评估，我们进一步提出了HorizonSuite，一个涵盖自我和智能体级别编辑任务（如轨迹修改和对象操控）的综合基准。大量实验表明，高斯-网格表示比其他3D表示提供显著更高的保真度，并且视频扩散中的时间先验对于连贯合成至关重要。结合这些发现，HorizonForge建立了一个简单而强大的照片写实、可控驾驶模拟范例，相对于目前第二好的最先进方法，实现了83.4%的用户偏好提升和25.19%的FID改进。项目页面：https://horizonforge.github.io/ 。

title: RETLLM: Training and Data-Free MLLMs for Multimodal Information Retrieval
summary: Multimodal information retrieval (MMIR) has gained attention for its flexibility in handling text, images, or mixed queries and candidates. Recent breakthroughs in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) boost MMIR performance by incorporating MLLM knowledge under the contrastive finetuning framework. However, they suffer from pre-training inconsistency and require large datasets. In this work, we introduce a novel framework, RetLLM, designed to query MLLMs for MMIR in a training- and data-free manner. Specifically, we formulate MMIR as a similarity score generation task and prompt MLLMs to directly predict retrieval scores in a coarse-then-fine pipeline. At the coarse stage, a top-k filtering strategy builds a small yet high-quality candidate pool for each query, enabling MLLMs to focus on semantically relevant candidates. Subsequently, the retrieval score is predicted by feeding both the query and candidate into MLLMs at the fine stage. Importantly, we propose a visual enhancement module during reasoning to help MLLMs re-pick forgotten visuals, improving retrieval. Extensive experiments on MMIR benchmarks show that RetLLM outperforms fine-tuned models. Ablation studies further verify each component. Our work demonstrates that MLLMs can achieve strong MMIR performance without any training, highlighting their inherent multimodal reasoning ability in a simple, scalable framework. We release our code at: https://github.com/alivecat05/RETLLM
tldr: The paper introduces RetLLM, a training- and data-free framework for multimodal information retrieval that leverages MLLMs to predict retrieval scores in a coarse-to-fine pipeline, achieving performance better than finetuned methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 RetLLM 的无需训练和数据的多模态信息检索框架，该框架利用 MLLM 以粗到精的方式预测检索分数， 性能优于微调方法。
summary_zh: 多模态信息检索（MMIR）因其在处理文本、图像或混合查询和候选内容方面的灵活性而备受关注。 多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）的最新突破通过在对比微调框架下结合MLLM知识，提升了MMIR的性能。 然而，它们受到预训练不一致性的困扰，并且需要大型数据集。 在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的框架RetLLM，旨在以一种无需训练且无需数据的方式查询MLLM以进行MMIR。 具体而言，我们将MMIR公式化为相似度评分生成任务，并提示MLLM以粗粒度到细粒度的流程直接预测检索分数。 在粗粒度阶段，一种top-k过滤策略为每个查询构建一个小型但高质量的候选池，使MLLM能够专注于语义相关的候选内容。 随后，通过在细粒度阶段将查询和候选内容都输入MLLM，来预测检索分数。 重要的是，我们在推理过程中提出了一种视觉增强模块，以帮助MLLM重新拾取被遗忘的视觉信息，从而改进检索。 在MMIR基准上的大量实验表明，RetLLM优于微调模型。 消融研究进一步验证了每个组件的有效性。 我们的工作表明，MLLM可以在没有任何训练的情况下获得强大的MMIR性能，突出了它们在一个简单、可扩展的框架中的固有多模态推理能力。 我们的代码已发布在：https://github.com/alivecat05/RETLLM

title: Code World Models for Parameter Control in Evolutionary Algorithms
summary: Can an LLM learn how an optimizer behaves -- and use that knowledge to control it? We extend Code World Models (CWMs), LLM-synthesized Python programs that predict environment dynamics, from deterministic games to stochastic combinatorial optimization. Given suboptimal trajectories of $(1{+}1)$-$\text{RLS}_k$, the LLM synthesizes a simulator of the optimizer's dynamics; greedy planning over this simulator then selects the mutation strength $k$ at each step. On \lo{} and \onemax{}, CWM-greedy performs within 6\% of the theoretically optimal policy -- without ever seeing optimal-policy trajectories. On \jump{$_k$}, where a deceptive valley causes all adaptive baselines to fail (0\% success rate), CWM-greedy achieves 100\% success rate -- without any collection policy using oracle knowledge of the gap parameter. On the NK-Landscape, where no closed-form model exists, CWM-greedy outperforms all baselines across fifteen independently generated instances ($36.94$ vs.\ $36.32$; $p<0.001$) when the prompt includes empirical transition statistics. The CWM also outperforms DQN in sample efficiency (200 offline trajectories vs.\ 500 online episodes), success rate (100\% vs.\ 58\%), and generalization ($k{=}3$: 78\% vs.\ 0\%). Robustness experiments confirm stable synthesis across 5 independent runs.
tldr: This paper introduces Code World Models (CWMs), which leverage LLMs to simulate optimizer dynamics in evolutionary algorithms for parameter control, achieving state-of-the-art results on several benchmark problems, including outperforming adaptive baselines and DQN.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了代码世界模型（CWMs），它利用大型语言模型来模拟进化算法中优化器的动力学，以进行参数控制，并在多个基准问题上取得了最先进的结果，包括优于自适应基线和DQN。
summary_zh: LLM能否学习优化器的行为，并利用该知识来控制它？我们扩展了代码世界模型 (CWMs)，这是一种LLM合成的Python程序，用于预测环境动态，并将其从确定性博弈扩展到随机组合优化。给定 $(1{+}1)$-$\text{RLS}_k$ 的次优轨迹，LLM合成一个优化器动力学的模拟器；然后，基于该模拟器的贪婪规划在每一步选择突变强度 $k$。在 \lo{} 和 \onemax{} 上，CWM贪婪策略的性能与理论最优策略相差不到 6\%，且从未见过最优策略轨迹。在 \jump{$_k$} 上，一个迷惑的谷地导致所有自适应基线失效（成功率为 0\%），CWM贪婪策略实现了 100\% 的成功率，且没有任何收集策略使用关于gap参数的预言机知识。在不存在闭式模型的 NK-Landscape 上，当提示包含经验转移统计数据时，CWM贪婪策略在十五个独立生成实例中优于所有基线（$36.94$ vs. $36.32$; $p<0.001$）。CWM 在样本效率（200 条离线轨迹 vs. 500 个在线回合）、成功率（100\% vs. 58\%）和泛化性（$k{=}3$: 78\% vs. 0\%）方面也优于 DQN。稳健性实验证实了在 5 次独立运行中合成的稳定性。

title: Geometric Priors for Generalizable World Models via Vector Symbolic Architecture
summary: A key challenge in artificial intelligence and neuroscience is understanding how neural systems learn representations that capture the underlying dynamics of the world. Most world models represent the transition function with unstructured neural networks, limiting interpretability, sample efficiency, and generalization to unseen states or action compositions. We address these issues with a generalizable world model grounded in Vector Symbolic Architecture (VSA) principles as geometric priors. Our approach utilizes learnable Fourier Holographic Reduced Representation (FHRR) encoders to map states and actions into a high dimensional complex vector space with learned group structure and models transitions with element-wise complex multiplication. We formalize the framework's group theoretic foundation and show how training such structured representations to be approximately invariant enables strong multi-step composition directly in latent space and generalization performances over various experiments. On a discrete grid world environment, our model achieves 87.5% zero shot accuracy to unseen state-action pairs, obtains 53.6% higher accuracy on 20-timestep horizon rollouts, and demonstrates 4x higher robustness to noise relative to an MLP baseline. These results highlight how training to have latent group structure yields generalizable, data-efficient, and interpretable world models, providing a principled pathway toward structured models for real-world planning and reasoning.
tldr: This paper proposes a novel world model based on Vector Symbolic Architecture (VSA) and learnable Fourier Holographic Reduced Representations (FHRR) to improve generalization, sample efficiency, and interpretability, achieving strong results on a discrete grid world task.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于向量符号架构（VSA）和可学习的傅里叶全息缩减表示（FHRR）的新型世界模型，以提高泛化性、样本效率和可解释性，并在离散网格世界任务上取得了良好的效果。
summary_zh: 人工智能和神经科学领域的一个关键挑战是理解神经系统如何学习捕捉世界底层动态的表征。大多数世界模型使用非结构化的神经网络来表示转移函数，这限制了可解释性、样本效率以及对未见状态或动作组合的泛化能力。我们通过一个基于向量符号架构 (VSA) 原则作为几何先验的可泛化世界模型来解决这些问题。我们的方法利用可学习的傅里叶全息约简表示 (FHRR) 编码器，将状态和动作映射到具有学习到的群结构的高维复向量空间，并使用元素级复数乘法来建模转移。我们形式化了该框架的群论基础，并展示了如何训练这种结构化表征使其近似不变，从而能够在潜在空间直接进行强大的多步组合并在各种实验中实现泛化性能。在一个离散网格世界环境中，我们的模型对未见状态-动作对实现了 87.5% 的零样本精度，在 20 步时间范围的展开中获得了高 53.6% 的精度，并且相对于 MLP 基线模型，噪声鲁棒性提高了 4 倍。这些结果突显了训练以获得潜在群结构如何产生可泛化、数据高效且可解释的世界模型，为现实世界中的规划和推理的结构化模型提供了一种有原则的途径。

title: SELAUR: Self Evolving LLM Agent via Uncertainty-aware Rewards
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as multi-step decision-making agents, where effective reward design is essential for guiding learning. Although recent work explores various forms of reward shaping and step-level credit assignment, a key signal remains largely overlooked: the intrinsic uncertainty of LLMs. Uncertainty reflects model confidence, reveals where exploration is needed, and offers valuable learning cues even in failed trajectories. We introduce SELAUR: Self Evolving LLM Agent via Uncertainty-aware Rewards, a reinforcement learning framework that incorporates uncertainty directly into the reward design. SELAUR integrates entropy-, least-confidence-, and margin-based metrics into a combined token-level uncertainty estimate, providing dense confidence-aligned supervision, and employs a failure-aware reward reshaping mechanism that injects these uncertainty signals into step- and trajectory-level rewards to improve exploration efficiency and learning stability. Experiments on two benchmarks, ALFWorld and WebShop, show that our method consistently improves success rates over strong baselines. Ablation studies further demonstrate how uncertainty signals enhance exploration and robustness.
tldr: SELAUR is a reinforcement learning framework that uses LLM uncertainty to design rewards for multi-step decision-making agents, showing improved success rates on ALFWorld and WebShop benchmarks.
tldr_zh: SELAUR是一个强化学习框架，它利用LLM的不确定性来设计多步骤决策代理的奖励，并在ALFWorld和WebShop基准测试中显示出更高的成功率。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正日益被部署为多步骤决策智能体，其中有效的奖励设计对于引导学习至关重要。尽管最近的工作探索了各种奖励塑造和步骤级信用分配形式，但一个关键信号仍然在很大程度上被忽视：LLMs 的内在不确定性。不确定性反映了模型的置信度，揭示了需要探索的地方，并即使在失败的轨迹中也能提供有价值的学习线索。我们引入了 SELAUR：通过不确定性感知奖励的自进化 LLM 智能体，这是一个将不确定性直接整合到奖励设计中的强化学习框架。SELAUR 将基于熵、最小置信度和间隔的指标整合到组合的令牌级不确定性估计中，从而提供密集的、与置信度对齐的监督，并采用一种失败感知的奖励重塑机制，将这些不确定性信号注入到步骤级和轨迹级奖励中，以提高探索效率和学习稳定性。在两个基准数据集上的实验，ALFWorld 和 WebShop，表明我们的方法始终优于强大的基线，提高了成功率。消融研究进一步证明了不确定性信号如何增强探索和鲁棒性。

title: System Design of the Ultra Mobility Vehicle: A Driving, Balancing, and Jumping Bicycle Robot
summary: Trials cyclists and mountain bike riders can hop, jump, balance, and drive on one or both wheels. This versatility allows them to achieve speed and energy-efficiency on smooth terrain and agility over rough terrain. Inspired by these athletes, we present the design and control of a robotic platform, Ultra Mobility Vehicle (UMV), which combines a bicycle and a reaction mass to move dynamically with minimal actuated degrees of freedom. We employ a simulation-driven design optimization process to synthesize a spatial linkage topology with a focus on vertical jump height and momentum-based balancing on a single wheel contact. Using a constrained Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework, we demonstrate zero-shot transfer of diverse athletic behaviors, including track-stands, jumps, wheelies, rear wheel hopping, and front flips. This 23.5 kg robot is capable of high speeds (8 m/s) and jumping on and over large obstacles (1 m tall, or 130% of the robot's nominal height).
tldr: This paper presents the design and control of a bicycle robot (UMV) capable of complex maneuvers like jumping and balancing, achieved through simulation-driven design optimization and constrained reinforcement learning.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种自行车机器人 (UMV) 的设计和控制，它能够通过模拟驱动的设计优化和约束强化学习实现复杂的动作，如跳跃和平衡。
summary_zh: 攀爬车和山地自行车骑手能够在单轮或双轮上进行跳跃、平衡和骑行。这种多功能性使他们能够在平坦地形上实现速度和能量效率，并在崎岖地形上实现敏捷性。受这些运动员的启发，我们提出了一种机器人平台——超机动车辆（UMV）的设计与控制方案，它结合了自行车和反作用质量，以最小的驱动自由度进行动态运动。我们采用仿真驱动的设计优化流程，合成一种空间连杆拓扑，重点关注垂直跳跃高度和基于动量的单轮接触平衡。利用约束强化学习（RL）框架，我们展示了多种运动行为的零样本迁移，包括原地平衡、跳跃、翘头、后 rueda 跳跃和前空翻。这种重 23.5 公斤的机器人能够达到高速（8 米/秒），并能够跳上和越过大型障碍物（1 米高，或机器人标称高度的 130%）。

title: Behavioral Cloning for Robotic Connector Assembly: An Empirical Study
summary: Automating the assembly of wire harnesses is challenging in automotive, electrical cabinet, and aircraft production, particularly due to deformable cables and a high variance in connector geometries. In addition, connectors must be inserted with limited force to avoid damage, while their poses can vary significantly. While humans can do this task intuitively by combining visual and haptic feedback, programming an industrial robot for such a task in an adaptable manner remains difficult. This work presents an empirical study investigating the suitability of behavioral cloning for learning an action prediction model for connector insertion that fuses force-torque sensing with a fixed position camera. We compare several network architectures and other design choices using a dataset of up to 300 successful human demonstrations collected via teleoperation of a UR5e robot with a SpaceMouse under varying connector poses. The resulting system is then evaluated against five different connector geometries under varying connector poses, achieving an overall insertion success rate of over 90 %.
tldr: This paper explores using behavioral cloning to train a robot to assemble wire harness connectors, achieving a 90% success rate across various connector geometries and poses using force-torque sensing and a camera.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用行为克隆训练机器人组装线束连接器，通过力矩传感器和摄像头，在各种连接器几何形状和姿势下实现了 90% 的成功率。
summary_zh: 在汽车、电力柜和飞机生产中，线束的自动化组装极具挑战性，尤其因为电缆易变形且连接器几何形状差异较大。此外，连接器的插入必须以有限的力进行，以避免损坏，同时其姿态变化可能很大。虽然人类可以通过结合视觉和触觉反馈来直观地完成此任务，但以适应性的方式为工业机器人编程来执行此类任务仍然很困难。 这项工作提出了一项实证研究，旨在调查行为克隆学习连接器插入动作预测模型（融合力矩传感与固定位置摄像头）的适用性。我们比较了几种网络架构和其他设计选择，使用了通过遥操作UR5e机器人（配备SpaceMouse）并在变化的连接器姿态下收集的最多300次成功的人工演示数据集。 然后，在变化的连接器姿态下，该系统针对五种不同的连接器几何形状进行评估，达到超过90%的总体插入成功率。

title: SunnyParking: Multi-Shot Trajectory Generation and Motion State Awareness for Human-like Parking
summary: Autonomous parking fundamentally differs from on-road driving due to its frequent direction changes and complex maneuvering requirements. However, existing End-to-End (E2E) planning methods often simplify the parking task into a geometric path regression problem, neglecting explicit modeling of the vehicle's kinematic state. This "dimensionality deficiency" easily leads to physically infeasible trajectories and deviates from real human driving behavior, particularly at critical gear-shift points in multi-shot parking scenarios. In this paper, we propose SunnyParking, a novel dual-branch E2E architecture that achieves motion state awareness by jointly predicting spatial trajectories and discrete motion state sequences (e.g., forward/reverse). Additionally, we introduce a Fourier feature-based representation of target parking slots to overcome the resolution limitations of traditional bird's-eye view (BEV) approaches, enabling high-precision target interactions. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework generates more robust and human-like trajectories in complex multi-shot parking scenarios, while significantly improving gear-shift point localization accuracy compared to state-of-the-art methods. We open-source a new parking dataset of the CARLA simulator, specifically designed to evaluate full prediction capabilities under complex maneuvers.
tldr: The paper introduces SunnyParking, an end-to-end autonomous parking system that jointly predicts spatial trajectories and motion states (forward/reverse) using a novel architecture and target representation, demonstrating improved human-like parking in complex scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SunnyParking，一个端到端的自动泊车系统，它使用一种新的架构和目标表示，联合预测空间轨迹和运动状态（前进/后退），从而在复杂的场景中展示了更像人类的泊车效果。
summary_zh: 自动泊车因其频繁的方向变换和复杂的操作需求而与道路驾驶存在根本上的差异。然而，现有的端到端（E2E）规划方法通常将泊车任务简化为几何路径回归问题，忽略了对车辆运动学状态的显式建模。这种“维度缺失”容易导致物理上不可行的轨迹，并偏离真实的人类驾驶行为，尤其是在多步骤泊车场景中的关键换挡点。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的双分支端到端架构SunnyParking，通过联合预测空间轨迹和离散运动状态序列（例如，前进/后退）来实现运动状态感知。此外，我们引入了一种基于傅里叶特征的目标泊车位表示方法，以克服传统鸟瞰图（BEV）方法的分辨率限制，从而实现高精度的目标交互。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的框架在复杂的多步骤泊车场景中生成了更鲁棒且更接近人类行为的轨迹，同时显著提高了换挡点定位精度。我们开源了一个新的CARLA模拟器泊车数据集，专门设计用于评估复杂操作下的完整预测能力。

title: ADM-DP: Adaptive Dynamic Modality Diffusion Policy through Vision-Tactile-Graph Fusion for Multi-Agent Manipulation
summary: Multi-agent robotic manipulation remains challenging due to the combined demands of coordination, grasp stability, and collision avoidance in shared workspaces. To address these challenges, we propose the Adaptive Dynamic Modality Diffusion Policy (ADM-DP), a framework that integrates vision, tactile, and graph-based (multi-agent pose) modalities for coordinated control. ADM-DP introduces four key innovations. First, an enhanced visual encoder merges RGB and point-cloud features via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) modulation to enrich perception. Second, a tactile-guided grasping strategy uses Force-Sensitive Resistor (FSR) feedback to detect insufficient contact and trigger corrective grasp refinement, improving grasp stability. Third, a graph-based collision encoder leverages shared tool center point (TCP) positions of multiple agents as structured kinematic context to maintain spatial awareness and reduce inter-agent interference. Fourth, an Adaptive Modality Attention Mechanism (AMAM) dynamically re-weights modalities according to task context, enabling flexible fusion. For scalability and modularity, a decoupled training paradigm is employed in which agents learn independent policies while sharing spatial information. This maintains low interdependence between agents while retaining collective awareness. Across seven multi-agent tasks, ADM-DP achieves 12-25% performance gains over state-of-the-art baselines. Ablation studies show the greatest improvements in tasks requiring multiple sensory modalities, validating our adaptive fusion strategy and demonstrating its robustness for diverse manipulation scenarios.
tldr: This paper introduces ADM-DP, a multi-agent manipulation framework using vision, tactile, and graph modalities with adaptive fusion and decoupled training to achieve significant performance gains in robotic tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了ADM-DP，一种多智能体操作框架，它结合了视觉、触觉和基于图的模式，采用自适应融合和解耦训练，在机器人任务中实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 多智能体机器人操作仍然具有挑战性，因为需要在共享工作空间中同时满足协调、抓取稳定性以及避碰等要求。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种自适应动态模态扩散策略 (ADM-DP) 框架，该框架集成了视觉、触觉和基于图的多智能体姿态模态，用于协同控制。ADM-DP引入了四项关键创新。首先，增强型视觉编码器通过特征级线性调制 (FiLM) 融合 RGB 和点云特征，以丰富感知。其次，触觉引导的抓取策略使用力敏电阻 (FSR) 反馈来检测不足的接触并触发纠正性抓取细化，从而提高抓取稳定性。第三，基于图的碰撞编码器利用多个智能體的共享工具中心点 (TCP) 位置作为结构化的运动学上下文，以保持空间感知并减少智能体间的干扰。第四，自适应模态注意力机制 (AMAM) 根据任务上下文动态地重新加权模态，从而实现灵活的融合。为了实现可扩展性和模块化，采用了分离的训练范式，其中智能体学习独立的策略，同时共享空间信息。这保持了智能体之间的低互依赖性，同时保留了集体意识。在七项多智能体任务中，ADM-DP 比最先进的基线方法获得了 12-25% 的性能提升。消融研究表明，在需要多种感觉模态的任务中，改进最为显著，验证了我们的自适应融合策略，并证明了其对各种操作场景的鲁棒性。

title: Learning Agile and Robust Omnidirectional Aerial Motion on Overactuated Tiltable-Quadrotors
summary: Tilt-rotor aerial robots enable omnidirectional maneuvering through thrust vectoring, but introduce significant control challenges due to the strong coupling between joint and rotor dynamics. While model-based controllers can achieve high motion accuracy under nominal conditions, their robustness and responsiveness often degrade in the presence of disturbances and modeling uncertainties. This work investigates reinforcement learning for omnidirectional aerial motion control on over-actuated tiltable quadrotors that prioritizes robustness and agility. We present a learning-based control framework that enables efficient acquisition of coordinated rotor-joint behaviors for reaching target poses in the $SE(3)$ space. To achieve reliable sim-to-real transfer while preserving motion accuracy, we integrate system identification with minimal and physically consistent domain randomization. Compared with a state-of-the-art NMPC controller, the proposed method achieves comparable six-degree-of-freedom pose tracking accuracy, while demonstrating superior robustness and generalization across diverse tasks, enabling zero-shot deployment on real hardware.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning framework for controlling over-actuated tiltable quadrotors, achieving robust omnidirectional motion with sim-to-real transfer and comparable accuracy to NMPC while exhibiting superior robustness and generalization.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的框架，用于控制过度驱动的可倾转旋翼四旋翼飞行器，实现鲁棒的全向运动，具有从仿真到真实的迁移能力，与NMPC相比，具有相当的精度，同时表现出卓越的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
summary_zh: 倾转旋翼飞行机器人通过推力矢量实现全向机动，但也由于关节和旋翼动力学之间的强耦合，引入了显著的控制挑战。虽然基于模型的控制器在标称条件下可以实现高运动精度，但其鲁棒性和响应性往往会在存在扰动和建模不确定性的情况下降低。本研究探索了强化学习在过驱动倾转四旋翼飞行器全向空中运动控制中的应用，重点关注鲁棒性和敏捷性。我们提出了一种基于学习的控制框架，可以有效地获取协调的旋翼-关节行为，以达到$SE(3)$空间中的目标姿态。为了在保持运动精度的同时实现可靠的仿真到真实迁移，我们将系统辨识与最小化且物理一致的域随机化相结合。与最先进的NMPC控制器相比，所提出的方法实现了相当的六自由度姿态跟踪精度，同时在各种任务中表现出卓越的鲁棒性和泛化能力，从而可以在真实硬件上实现零样本部署。

title: CableRobotGraphSim: A Graph Neural Network for Modeling Partially Observable Cable-Driven Robot Dynamics
summary: General-purpose simulators have accelerated the development of robots. Traditional simulators based on first-principles, however, typically require full-state observability or depend on parameter search for system identification. This work presents \texttt{CableRobotGraphSim}, a novel Graph Neural Network (GNN) model for cable-driven robots that aims to address shortcomings of prior simulation solutions. By representing cable-driven robots as graphs, with the rigid-bodies as nodes and the cables and contacts as edges, this model can quickly and accurately match the properties of other simulation models and real robots, while ingesting only partially observable inputs. Accompanying the GNN model is a sim-and-real co-training procedure that promotes generalization and robustness to noisy real data. This model is further integrated with a Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller for closed-loop navigation, which showcases the model's speed and accuracy.
tldr: This paper introduces CableRobotGraphSim, a GNN-based model for simulating cable-driven robot dynamics using partially observable data and a sim-to-real co-training strategy, demonstrating its efficacy with a MPPI controller.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 CableRobotGraphSim，一个基于 GNN 的模型，用于模拟使用部分可观测数据的索驱动机器人的动力学，利用模拟到实际的联合训练策略，并通过 MPPI 控制器展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 通用型仿真器加速了机器人的开发进程。然而，基于第一性原理的传统仿真器通常需要完全状态可观测性，或者依赖参数搜索进行系统辨识。本文提出了一种用于绳驱动机器人的新型图神经网络（GNN）模型 \texttt{CableRobotGraphSim}，旨在解决先前仿真方案的不足。通过将绳驱动机器人表示为图，其中刚体为节点，缆绳和接触为边，该模型可以快速且准确地匹配其他仿真模型和真实机器人的属性，同时仅需摄取部分可观测的输入。与 GNN 模型配套的是一种模拟-真实协同训练程序，该程序可提高泛化能力和对噪声真实数据的鲁棒性。该模型进一步集成了模型预测路径积分（MPPI）控制器，用于闭环导航，从而展示了该模型的速度和准确性。

title: Learning Deformable Object Manipulation Using Task-Level Iterative Learning Control
summary: Dynamic manipulation of deformable objects is challenging for humans and robots because they have infinite degrees of freedom and exhibit underactuated dynamics. We introduce a Task-Level Iterative Learning Control method for dynamic manipulation of deformable objects. We demonstrate this method on a non-planar rope manipulation task called the flying knot. Using a single human demonstration and a simplified rope model, the method learns directly on hardware without reliance on large amounts of demonstration data or massive amounts of simulation. At each iteration, the algorithm constructs a local inverse model of the robot and rope by solving a quadratic program to propagate task-space errors into action updates. We evaluate performance across 7 different kinds of ropes, including chain, latex surgical tubing, and braided and twisted ropes, ranging in thicknesses of 7--25mm and densities of 0.013--0.5 kg/m. Learning achieves a 100\% success rate within 10 trials on all ropes. Furthermore, the method can successfully transfer between most rope types in approximately 2--5 trials. https://flying-knots.github.io
tldr: This paper introduces a Task-Level Iterative Learning Control method for dynamic manipulation of deformable objects, specifically demonstrated on a rope manipulation task, achieving high success rates and transfer learning capabilities across different rope types with limited data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种任务级迭代学习控制方法，用于动态操作可变形物体，特别是在绳索操作任务中进行了演示，在使用有限数据的情况下，在不同类型的绳索上实现了高成功率和迁移学习能力。
summary_zh: 形变物体的动态操作对人类和机器人来说都具有挑战性，因为它们具有无限的自由度和欠驱动特性。我们提出了一种用于形变物体动态操作的任务级迭代学习控制方法。我们通过一个非平面绳索操作任务，即“飞结”，来演示该方法。该方法使用单个人类演示和一个简化的绳索模型，直接在硬件上进行学习，而无需依赖大量的演示数据或大量的模拟。在每次迭代中，算法通过解决一个二次规划问题来构建机器人和绳索的局部逆模型，从而将任务空间误差传播到动作更新中。我们评估了7种不同绳索的性能，包括链条、乳胶外科导管以及编织和缠绕绳索，厚度范围为7-25毫米，密度范围为0.013-0.5千克/米。在所有绳索上，学习均在10次试验内实现了100%的成功率。此外，该方法可以在大约2-5次试验内在大多数绳索类型之间成功迁移。 https://flying-knots.github.io

title: Efficient Hierarchical Any-Angle Path Planning on Multi-Resolution 3D Grids
summary: Hierarchical, multi-resolution volumetric mapping approaches are widely used to represent large and complex environments as they can efficiently capture their occupancy and connectivity information. Yet widely used path planning methods such as sampling and trajectory optimization do not exploit this explicit connectivity information, and search-based methods such as A* suffer from scalability issues in large-scale high-resolution maps. In many applications, Euclidean shortest paths form the underpinning of the navigation system. For such applications, any-angle planning methods, which find optimal paths by connecting corners of obstacles with straight-line segments, provide a simple and efficient solution. In this paper, we present a method that has the optimality and completeness properties of any-angle planners while overcoming computational tractability issues common to search-based methods by exploiting multi-resolution representations. Extensive experiments on real and synthetic environments demonstrate the proposed approach's solution quality and speed, outperforming even sampling-based methods. The framework is open-sourced to allow the robotics and planning community to build on our research.
tldr: This paper introduces an efficient hierarchical any-angle path planning method on multi-resolution 3D grids, achieving optimality and completeness while outperforming existing methods in speed and solution quality.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种在多分辨率3D网格上高效的分层任意角度路径规划方法，该方法在实现最优性和完备性的同时，在速度和解决方案质量方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 分层、多分辨率的体素化地图构建方法被广泛用于表示大型和复杂的环境，因为它们能够有效地捕获环境的占据和连通性信息。然而，诸如采样和轨迹优化等广泛使用的路径规划方法并未利用这种显式的连通性信息，而诸如A*等基于搜索的方法则在大型高分辨率地图中面临可扩展性问题。在许多应用中，欧几里得最短路径构成了导航系统的基础。对于此类应用，任意角度规划方法通过用直线段连接障碍物的角点来寻找最优路径，提供了一种简单而有效的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法，它具有任意角度规划器的最优性和完备性，同时通过利用多分辨率表示克服了基于搜索的方法常见的计算处理难度问题。在真实和合成环境中的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在解决方案质量和速度方面都表现出色，甚至超越了基于采样的方法。该框架已开源，以方便机器人和规划社区在其基础上开展研究。

title: Provable Last-Iterate Convergence for Multi-Objective Safe LLM Alignment via Optimistic Primal-Dual
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) plays a significant role in aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with human preferences. While RLHF with expected reward constraints can be formulated as a primal-dual optimization problem, standard primal-dual methods only guarantee convergence with a distributional policy where the saddle-point problem is in convex-concave form. Moreover, standard primal-dual methods may exhibit instability or divergence in the last iterate under policy parameterization in practical applications. In this work, we propose a universal primal-dual framework for safe RLHF that unifies a broad class of existing alignment algorithms, including safe-RLHF, one-shot, and multi-shot based methods. Building on this framework, we introduce an optimistic primal-dual (OPD) algorithm that incorporates predictive updates for both primal and dual variables to stabilize saddle-point dynamics. We establish last-iterate convergence guarantees for the proposed method, covering both exact policy optimization in the distributional space and convergence to a neighborhood of the optimal solution whose gap is related to approximation error and bias under parameterized policies. Our analysis reveals that optimism plays a crucial role in mitigating oscillations inherent to constrained alignment objectives, thereby closing a key theoretical gap between constrained RL and practical RLHF.
tldr: This paper presents an optimistic primal-dual algorithm for safe RLHF, unifying various alignment algorithms and providing last-iterate convergence guarantees, addressing the instability issue in policy parameterization.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于安全RLHF的乐观原始-对偶算法，统一了各种对齐算法，并提供了最后一次迭代的收敛保证，解决了策略参数化中的不稳定问题。
summary_zh: 从人类反馈中进行强化学习（RLHF）在使大型语言模型（LLMs）与人类偏好对齐方面发挥着重要作用。虽然具有期望奖励约束的RLHF可以被公式化为一个原始-对偶优化问题，但标准的原始-对偶方法仅能保证在鞍点问题呈凸凹形式的分布策略下的收敛。此外，在实际应用中，采用策略参数化的标准原始-对偶方法可能表现出不稳定或发散的最后一次迭代。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用的安全RLHF原始-对偶框架，它统一了广泛的现有对齐算法，包括安全-RLHF、单轮和多轮方法。在此框架的基础上，我们引入了一种乐观原始-对偶（OPD）算法，该算法结合了原始和对偶变量的预测更新，以稳定鞍点动力学。我们为所提出的方法建立了最后一次迭代的收敛保证，涵盖了分布空间中的精确策略优化，以及在参数化策略下收敛到最优解的邻域，其gap与近似误差和偏差相关。我们的分析表明，乐观性在缓解约束对齐目标固有的振荡方面起着至关重要的作用，从而弥合了约束强化学习与实用RLHF之间的关键理论差距。

title: Semantic Partial Grounding via LLMs
summary: Grounding is a critical step in classical planning, yet it often becomes a computational bottleneck due to the exponential growth in grounded actions and atoms as task size increases. Recent advances in partial grounding have addressed this challenge by incrementally grounding only the most promising operators, guided by predictive models. However, these approaches primarily rely on relational features or learned embeddings and do not leverage the textual and structural cues present in PDDL descriptions. We propose SPG-LLM, which uses LLMs to analyze the domain and problem files to heuristically identify potentially irrelevant objects, actions, and predicates prior to grounding, significantly reducing the size of the grounded task. Across seven hard-to-ground benchmarks, SPG-LLM achieves faster grounding-often by orders of magnitude-while delivering comparable or better plan costs in some domains.
tldr: This paper presents SPG-LLM, a novel approach that uses LLMs to heuristically prune irrelevant objects, actions, and predicates in classical planning before grounding, significantly reducing grounding time while maintaining plan quality.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了SPG-LLM，一种利用大型语言模型在经典规划中启发式地裁剪不相关的对象、动作和谓词，从而显著减少 grounding 时间并保持计划质量的新方法。
summary_zh: 基石化是经典规划中的关键步骤，但由于基石化行动和原子随着任务规模的增加呈指数增长，它通常会成为计算瓶颈。最近在部分基石化方面的进展通过在预测模型的指导下，增量式地仅基石化最有希望的算子来解决这一挑战。然而，这些方法主要依赖于关系特征或学习到的嵌入，而没有利用 PDDL 描述中存在的文本和结构线索。我们提出了 SPG-LLM，它使用 LLM 来分析领域和问题文件，从而在基石化之前启发式地识别潜在的不相关对象、动作和谓词，从而显著减小了基石化任务的大小。在七个难以基石化的基准测试中，SPG-LLM 实现了更快的基石化——通常数量级更快——同时在某些领域内提供了可比较或更好的计划代价。

title: Learning Rewards, Not Labels: Adversarial Inverse Reinforcement Learning for Machinery Fault Detection
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers significant promise for machinery fault detection (MFD). However, most existing RL-based MFD approaches do not fully exploit RL's sequential decision-making strengths, often treating MFD as a simple guessing game (Contextual Bandits). To bridge this gap, we formulate MFD as an offline inverse reinforcement learning problem, where the agent learns the reward dynamics directly from healthy operational sequences, thereby bypassing the need for manual reward engineering and fault labels. Our framework employs Adversarial Inverse Reinforcement Learning to train a discriminator that distinguishes between normal (expert) and policy-generated transitions. The discriminator's learned reward serves as an anomaly score, indicating deviations from normal operating behaviour. When evaluated on three run-to-failure benchmark datasets (HUMS2023, IMS, and XJTU-SY), the model consistently assigns low anomaly scores to normal samples and high scores to faulty ones, enabling early and robust fault detection. By aligning RL's sequential reasoning with MFD's temporal structure, this work opens a path toward RL-based diagnostics in data-driven industrial settings.
tldr: This paper presents an adversarial inverse reinforcement learning framework for machinery fault detection that learns reward dynamics from normal operational sequences, achieving early and robust fault detection without manual reward engineering or fault labels.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于机械故障检测的对抗逆强化学习框架，该框架从正常运行序列中学习奖励动态，无需手动奖励工程或故障标签即可实现早期、稳健的故障检测。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）为机械故障检测（MFD）提供了巨大的潜力。然而，现有的大多数基于RL的MFD方法并未充分利用RL的序列决策优势，通常将MFD视为一个简单的猜测游戏（情境老虎机）。为了弥合这一差距，我们将MFD建模为一个离线逆强化学习问题，其中智能体直接从健康的运行序列中学习奖励动态，从而绕过了手动奖励工程和故障标签的需求。我们的框架采用对抗逆强化学习来训练一个判别器，该判别器区分正常（专家）和策略生成的转换。判别器学习到的奖励充当异常分数，指示偏离正常运行行为的程度。在三个直至失效基准数据集（HUMS2023、IMS和XJTU-SY）上进行评估时，该模型始终为正常样本分配较低的异常分数，为有故障的样本分配较高的分数，从而实现早期和稳健的故障检测。通过将RL的序列推理与MFD的时间结构对齐，这项工作为在数据驱动的工业环境中基于RL的诊断开辟了一条道路。

title: RGB-Event HyperGraph Prompt for Kilometer Marker Recognition based on Pre-trained Foundation Models
summary: Metro trains often operate in highly complex environments, characterized by illumination variations, high-speed motion, and adverse weather conditions. These factors pose significant challenges for visual perception systems, especially those relying solely on conventional RGB cameras. To tackle these difficulties, we explore the integration of event cameras into the perception system, leveraging their advantages in low-light conditions, high-speed scenarios, and low power consumption. Specifically, we focus on Kilometer Marker Recognition (KMR), a critical task for autonomous metro localization under GNSS-denied conditions. In this context, we propose a robust baseline method based on a pre-trained RGB OCR foundation model, enhanced through multi-modal adaptation. Furthermore, we construct the first large-scale RGB-Event dataset, EvMetro5K, containing 5,599 pairs of synchronized RGB-Event samples, split into 4,479 training and 1,120 testing samples. Extensive experiments on EvMetro5K and other widely used benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for KMR. Both the dataset and source code will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/EvMetro5K_benchmark
tldr: The paper introduces a new RGB-Event dataset (EvMetro5K) and a baseline method for kilometer marker recognition using a pre-trained RGB OCR foundation model, addressing challenges in metro train localization under GNSS-denied conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的RGB-Event数据集(EvMetro5K)和一个基于预训练RGB OCR基础模型的里程碑识别基线方法，旨在解决地铁列车在GNSS受限条件下定位的挑战。
summary_zh: 地铁列车通常在高度复杂的环境中运行，这些环境的特点是光照变化大、高速运动和恶劣天气条件。这些因素对视觉感知系统提出了重大挑战，特别是那些仅依赖传统RGB相机的系统。为了应对这些困难，我们探索将事件相机集成到感知系统中，利用其在低光照条件、高速场景和低功耗方面的优势。具体而言，我们专注于公里标识别 (KMR)，这是在 GNSS 受限条件下自主地铁定位的关键任务。在此背景下，我们提出了一种基于预训练RGB OCR基础模型的鲁棒基线方法，并通过多模态自适应进行增强。此外，我们构建了首个大规模RGB-事件数据集 EvMetro5K，其中包含 5,599 对同步的 RGB-事件样本，分为 4,479 个训练样本和 1,120 个测试样本。在 EvMetro5K 和其他广泛使用的基准上进行的大量实验证明了我们的方法对 KMR 的有效性。数据集和源代码都将在 https://github.com/Event-AHU/EvMetro5K_benchmark 上发布。

title: Understanding Annotation Error Propagation and Learning an Adaptive Policy for Expert Intervention in Barrett's Video Segmentation
summary: Accurate annotation of endoscopic videos is essential yet time-consuming, particularly for challenging datasets such as dysplasia in Barrett's esophagus, where the affected regions are irregular and lack clear boundaries. Semi-automatic tools like Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) can ease this process by propagating annotations across frames, but small errors often accumulate and reduce accuracy, requiring expert review and correction. To address this, we systematically study how annotation errors propagate across different prompt types, namely masks, boxes, and points, and propose Learning-to-Re-Prompt (L2RP), a cost-aware framework that learns when and where to seek expert input. By tuning a human-cost parameter, our method balances annotation effort and segmentation accuracy. Experiments on a private Barrett's dysplasia dataset and the public SUN-SEG benchmark demonstrate improved temporal consistency and superior performance over baseline strategies.
tldr: This paper studies error propagation in semi-automatic video segmentation using SAM2 for Barrett's esophagus, and proposes a cost-aware reinforcement learning framework called L2RP to learn when and where to seek expert input for optimal annotation effort and accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了使用SAM2进行半自动视频分割时，针对巴雷特食管的错误传播问题，并提出了一种名为L2RP的成本感知强化学习框架，用于学习何时以及在何处寻求专家帮助，以实现最佳的标注工作量和准确性。
summary_zh: 内窥镜视频的准确标注至关重要，但却非常耗时，尤其是在具有挑战性的数据集上，比如巴雷特食管中的发育不良，其受影响区域不规则且缺乏清晰边界。诸如Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2)之类的半自动工具可以通过在帧之间传播标注来简化这个过程，但小错误经常会累积并降低准确性，需要专家审查和纠正。为了解决这个问题，我们系统地研究了标注错误如何在不同的提示类型（即掩码、框和点）之间传播，并提出了Learning-to-Re-Prompt (L2RP)，这是一个成本敏感的框架，可以学习何时以及在何处寻求专家输入。通过调整人工成本参数，我们的方法可以平衡标注工作量和分割准确性。在私有的巴雷特食管发育不良数据集和公开的SUN-SEG基准测试上的实验表明，该方法相比基线策略，提高了时间一致性并表现出卓越的性能。

title: Two-Stage Active Distribution Network Voltage Control via LLM-RL Collaboration: A Hybrid Knowledge-Data-Driven Approach
summary: The growing integration of distributed photovoltaics (PVs) into active distribution networks (ADNs) has exacerbated operational challenges, making it imperative to coordinate diverse equipment to mitigate voltage violations and enhance power quality. Although existing data-driven approaches have demonstrated effectiveness in the voltage control problem, they often require extensive trial-and-error exploration and struggle to incorporate heterogeneous information, such as day-ahead forecasts and semantic-based grid codes. Considering the operational scenarios and requirements in real-world ADNs, in this paper, we propose a hybrid knowledge-data-driven approach that leverages dynamic collaboration between a large language model (LLM) agent and a reinforcement learning (RL) agent to achieve two-stage voltage control. In the day-ahead stage, the LLM agent receives coarse region-level forecasts and generates scheduling strategies for on-load tap changer (OLTC) and shunt capacitors (SCs) to regulate the overall voltage profile. Then in the intra-day stage, based on accurate node-level measurements, the RL agent refines terminal voltages by deriving reactive power generation strategies for PV inverters. On top of the LLM-RL collaboration framework, we further propose a self-evolution mechanism for the LLM agent and a pretrain-finetune pipeline for the RL agent, effectively enhancing and coordinating the policies for both agents. The proposed approach not only aligns more closely with practical operational characteristics but also effectively utilizes the inherent knowledge and reasoning capabilities of the LLM agent, significantly improving training efficiency and voltage control performance. Comprehensive comparisons and ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
tldr: This paper presents a hybrid knowledge-data-driven approach for active distribution network voltage control. It uses an LLM for day-ahead scheduling and an RL agent for intra-day refinement, demonstrating improved training efficiency and voltage control.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合知识-数据驱动的方法，用于主动配电网络电压控制。它利用LLM进行日前调度，利用RL代理进行日内优化，从而提高训练效率和电压控制。
summary_zh:
摘要：
分布式光伏（PV）日益融入有源配电网络（ADN），加剧了运行挑战，因此必须协调各种设备以缓解电压越限并提高电能质量。尽管现有的数据驱动方法已在电压控制问题中展现出有效性，但它们通常需要大量的试错探索，并且难以整合异构信息，例如日前预测和基于语义的电网规范。考虑到实际ADN中的运行场景和需求，本文提出了一种混合知识-数据驱动方法，该方法利用大型语言模型（LLM）代理和强化学习（RL）代理之间的动态协作来实现两阶段电压控制。在日前阶段，LLM代理接收粗略的区域级预测，并生成有载调压变压器（OLTC）和并联电容器（SC）的调度策略，以调节整体电压曲线。然后在日内阶段，基于精确的节点级测量，RL代理通过推导光伏逆变器的无功功率生成策略来优化终端电压。在LLM-RL协作框架之上，我们进一步提出了针对LLM代理的自进化机制和针对RL代理的预训练-微调流程，从而有效增强和协调两个代理的策略。所提出的方法不仅更符合实际运行特性，而且有效地利用了LLM代理固有的知识和推理能力，显著提高了训练效率和电压控制性能。全面的比较和消融研究证明了该方法的有效性。

title: Training Generalizable Collaborative Agents via Strategic Risk Aversion
summary: Many emerging agentic paradigms require agents to collaborate with one another (or people) to achieve shared goals. Unfortunately, existing approaches to learning policies for such collaborative problems produce brittle solutions that fail when paired with new partners. We attribute these failures to a combination of free-riding during training and a lack of strategic robustness. To address these problems, we study the concept of strategic risk aversion and interpret it as a principled inductive bias for generalizable cooperation with unseen partners. While strategically risk-averse players are robust to deviations in their partner's behavior by design, we show that, in collaborative games, they also (1) can have better equilibrium outcomes than those at classical game-theoretic concepts like Nash, and (2) exhibit less or no free-riding. Inspired by these insights, we develop a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) algorithm that integrates strategic risk aversion into standard policy optimization methods. Our empirical results across collaborative benchmarks (including an LLM collaboration task) validate our theory and demonstrate that our approach consistently achieves reliable collaboration with heterogeneous and previously unseen partners across collaborative tasks.
tldr: This paper introduces a multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm incorporating strategic risk aversion to improve the generalizability of collaborative agents when interacting with unseen partners, demonstrating improved performance and reduced free-riding in collaborative benchmarks including an LLM task.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种多智能体强化学习算法，该算法结合了战略风险规避，以提高协作智能体与未见过伙伴交互时的泛化能力。该算法在包括LLM任务在内的协作基准测试中表现出更好的性能并减少了搭便车行为。
summary_zh: 许多新兴的代理范式要求智能体相互协作（或与人类协作）以实现共同目标。不幸的是，现有学习此类协作问题策略的方法产生脆弱的解决方案，当与新的伙伴配对时会失效。我们将这些失败归因于训练期间的搭便车行为和缺乏战略鲁棒性的结合。为了解决这些问题，我们研究了战略风险规避的概念，并将其解释为与未见过的伙伴进行可泛化合作的原则性归纳偏置。虽然战略性风险规避的参与者在设计上对伙伴行为的偏差具有鲁棒性，但我们表明，在协作博弈中，他们也 (1) 可以获得比经典博弈论概念（如纳什均衡）更好的均衡结果，并且 (2) 表现出更少或没有搭便车行为。受这些见解的启发，我们开发了一种多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 算法，该算法将战略风险规避集成到标准策略优化方法中。我们在协作基准测试（包括 LLM 协作任务）中的实验结果验证了我们的理论，并表明我们的方法在协作任务中始终能与异构且以前未见过的伙伴实现可靠的协作。

title: Adversarial Intent is a Latent Variable: Stateful Trust Inference for Securing Multimodal Agentic RAG
summary: Current stateless defences for multimodal agentic RAG fail to detect adversarial strategies that distribute malicious semantics across retrieval, planning, and generation components. We formulate this security challenge as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP), where adversarial intent is a latent variable inferred from noisy multi-stage observations. We introduce MMA-RAG^T, an inference-time control framework governed by a Modular Trust Agent (MTA) that maintains an approximate belief state via structured LLM reasoning. Operating as a model-agnostic overlay, MMA-RAGT mediates a configurable set of internal checkpoints to enforce stateful defence-in-depth. Extensive evaluation on 43,774 instances demonstrates a 6.50x average reduction factor in Attack Success Rate relative to undefended baselines, with negligible utility cost. Crucially, a factorial ablation validates our theoretical bounds: while statefulness and spatial coverage are individually necessary (26.4 pp and 13.6 pp gains respectively), stateless multi-point intervention can yield zero marginal benefit under homogeneous stateless filtering when checkpoint detections are perfectly correlated.
tldr: This paper introduces MMA-RAG^T, a stateful defense mechanism for multimodal agentic RAG systems that uses a POMDP formulation and a Modular Trust Agent to detect and mitigate adversarial intent, achieving significant reductions in attack success rates. The approach emphasizes the importance of statefulness in security defenses.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了MMA-RAG^T，一种用于多模态代理式RAG系统的有状态防御机制，它使用POMDP公式和模块化信任代理来检测和减轻对抗意图，从而显著降低攻击成功率。该方法强调了状态性在安全防御中的重要性。
summary_zh: 针对多模态自主RAG的当前无状态防御措施无法检测出将恶意语义分散到检索、规划和生成组件中的对抗性策略。我们将这一安全挑战建模为部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程(POMDP)，其中对抗意图是一个从嘈杂的多阶段观测中推断出的潜在变量。我们引入了MMA-RAG^T，这是一个由模块化信任代理(MTA)控制的推理时控制框架，该代理通过结构化LLM推理来维护一个近似信念状态。MMA-RAG^T作为一个模型无关的覆盖层运行，协调一组可配置的内部检查点，以强制执行状态防御纵深。在43,774个实例上的广泛评估表明，相对于未防御的基线，攻击成功率平均降低了6.50倍，效用成本可忽略不计。至关重要的是，析因消融验证了我们的理论界限：虽然状态性和空间覆盖率各自都是必要的（分别获得了26.4个百分点和13.6个百分点的收益），但当检查点检测完全相关时，在同质无状态过滤下，无状态多点干预可能产生零边际效益。

title: Provably Safe Generative Sampling with Constricting Barrier Functions
summary: Flow-based generative models, such as diffusion models and flow matching models, have achieved remarkable success in learning complex data distributions. However, a critical gap remains for their deployment in safety-critical domains: the lack of formal guarantees that generated samples will satisfy hard constraints. We address this by proposing a safety filtering framework that acts as an online shield for any pre-trained generative model. Our key insight is to cooperate with the generative process rather than override it. We define a constricting safety tube that is relaxed at the initial noise distribution and progressively tightens to the target safe set at the final data distribution, mirroring the coarse-to-fine structure of the generative process itself. By characterizing this tube via Control Barrier Functions (CBFs), we synthesize a feedback control input through a convex Quadratic Program (QP) at each sampling step. As the tube is loosest when noise is high and intervention is cheapest in terms of control energy, most constraint enforcement occurs when it least disrupts the model's learned structure. We prove that this mechanism guarantees safe sampling while minimizing the distributional shift from the original model at each sampling step, as quantified by the KL divergence. Our framework applies to any pre-trained flow-based generative scheme requiring no retraining or architectural modifications. We validate the approach across constrained image generation, physically-consistent trajectory sampling, and safe robotic manipulation policies, achieving 100% constraint satisfaction while preserving semantic fidelity.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel safety filtering framework for flow-based generative models using Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to guarantee safe sample generation in safety-critical domains, without retraining the original model.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的安全过滤框架，该框架使用控制障碍函数 (CBF) 用于基于流的生成模型，以保证在安全关键领域中生成安全样本，而无需重新训练原始模型。
summary_zh: 基于流的生成模型，例如扩散模型和流匹配模型，在学习复杂数据分布方面取得了显著成功。然而，对于它们在安全关键领域中的部署，仍然存在一个关键缺口：缺乏对生成样本将满足硬约束的形式化保证。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种安全过滤框架，该框架可以充当任何预训练生成模型的在线保护层。我们的关键洞察在于与生成过程协作，而不是覆盖它。我们定义了一个收缩的安全管道，该管道在初始噪声分布处是宽松的，并逐步收紧到最终数据分布处的目标安全集，从而反映了生成过程本身的由粗到精的结构。通过使用控制障碍函数（CBF）来表征该管道，我们在每个采样步骤中通过凸二次规划（QP）来合成反馈控制输入。由于管道在噪声较高时最宽松，并且在控制能量方面干预成本最低，因此大多数约束强制执行发生于对模型学习结构影响最小的时候。我们证明了这种机制保证了安全采样，同时最大限度地减少了在每个采样步骤中相对于原始模型的分布偏移，这可以通过KL散度来量化。我们的框架适用于任何预训练的基于流的生成方案，无需重新训练或架构修改。我们在约束图像生成、物理一致的轨迹采样和安全机器人操纵策略等方面验证了该方法，实现了100%的约束满足，同时保留了语义保真度。

title: WeatherCity: Urban Scene Reconstruction with Controllable Multi-Weather Transformation
summary: Editable high-fidelity 4D scenes are crucial for autonomous driving, as they can be applied to end-to-end training and closed-loop simulation. However, existing reconstruction methods are primarily limited to replicating observed scenes and lack the capability for diverse weather simulation. While image-level weather editing methods tend to introduce scene artifacts and offer poor controllability over the weather effects. To address these limitations, we propose WeatherCity, a novel framework for 4D urban scene reconstruction and weather editing. Specifically, we leverage a text-guided image editing model to achieve flexible editing of image weather backgrounds. To tackle the challenge of multi-weather modeling, we introduce a novel weather Gaussian representation based on shared scene features and dedicated weather-specific decoders. This representation is further enhanced with a content consistency optimization, ensuring coherent modeling across different weather conditions. Additionally, we design a physics-driven model that simulates dynamic weather effects through particles and motion patterns. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets and various scenes demonstrate that WeatherCity achieves flexible controllability, high fidelity, and temporal consistency in 4D reconstruction and weather editing. Our framework not only enables fine-grained control over weather conditions (e.g., light rain and heavy snow) but also supports object-level manipulation within the scene.
tldr: WeatherCity reconstructs 4D urban scenes with controllable multi-weather transformations using a novel weather Gaussian representation and physics-driven simulation, enabling fine-grained weather and object manipulation.
tldr_zh: WeatherCity通过一种新的天气高斯表示和物理驱动的模拟，重建具有可控多天气变换的 4D 城市场景，从而实现对天气和物体的精细控制。
summary_zh: 可编辑的高保真4D场景对于自动驾驶至关重要，因为它们可以应用于端到端训练和闭环仿真。然而，现有的重建方法主要局限于复制观测到的场景，缺乏模拟多样化天气的能力。虽然图像层面的天气编辑方法容易引入场景伪影，并且对天气效果的控制性较差。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了WeatherCity，一个用于4D城市场景重建和天气编辑的新框架。具体而言，我们利用文本引导的图像编辑模型来实现对图像天气背景的灵活编辑。为了解决多天气建模的挑战，我们引入了一种基于共享场景特征和专用天气特定解码器的新型天气高斯表示。这种表示通过内容一致性优化进一步增强，确保在不同天气条件下的一致建模。此外，我们设计了一个物理驱动模型，通过粒子和运动模式模拟动态天气效果。在多个数据集和各种场景下进行的大量实验表明，WeatherCity在4D重建和天气编辑方面实现了灵活的可控性、高保真度和时间一致性。我们的框架不仅可以对天气状况（例如小雨和大雪）进行细粒度控制，而且支持场景内的物体级操作。

title: RT-RMOT: A Dataset and Framework for RGB-Thermal Referring Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Referring Multi-Object Tracking has attracted increasing attention due to its human-friendly interactive characteristics, yet it exhibits limitations in low-visibility conditions, such as nighttime, smoke, and other challenging scenarios. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new RGB-Thermal RMOT task, named RT-RMOT, which aims to fuse RGB appearance features with the illumination robustness of the thermal modality to enable all-day referring multi-object tracking. To promote research on RT-RMOT, we construct the first Referring Multi-Object Tracking dataset under RGB-Thermal modality, named RefRT. It contains 388 language descriptions, 1,250 tracked targets, and 166,147 Language-RGB-Thermal (L-RGB-T) triplets. Furthermore, we propose RTrack, a framework built upon a multimodal large language model (MLLM) that integrates RGB, thermal, and textual features. Since the initial framework still leaves room for improvement, we introduce a Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) strategy to further exploit the model's potential. To alleviate training instability during RL fine-tuning, we introduce a Clipped Advantage Scaling (CAS) strategy to suppress gradient explosion. In addition, we design Structured Output Reward and Comprehensive Detection Reward to balance exploration and exploitation, thereby improving the completeness and accuracy of target perception. Extensive experiments on the RefRT dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed RTrack framework.
tldr: The paper introduces a new RGB-Thermal Referring Multi-Object Tracking (RT-RMOT) task, dataset (RefRT), and framework (RTrack) using an MLLM, along with specific RL fine-tuning strategies to improve performance in low-visibility conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的RGB-Thermal Referring Multi-Object Tracking (RT-RMOT) 任务，数据集 (RefRT) 和框架 (RTrack)，该框架使用多模态大型语言模型（MLLM），并结合特定的强化学习微调策略来提高在低可见度条件下的性能。
summary_zh:
摘要：
指称多目标跟踪因其人性化的交互特性而日益受到关注，但其在低能见度环境下（如夜间、烟雾及其他具有挑战性的场景）表现出局限性。为克服这一限制，我们提出了一种新的RGB-热成像RMOT任务，命名为RT-RMOT，旨在将RGB外观特征与热成像模态的照明鲁棒性相融合，实现全天候指称多目标跟踪。为促进RT-RMOT的研究，我们构建了首个RGB-热成像模态下的指称多目标跟踪数据集，名为RefRT。它包含388条语言描述、1250个跟踪目标和166147个语言-RGB-热成像（L-RGB-T）三元组。此外，我们提出了RTrack，一个建立在多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）之上的框架，集成了RGB、热成像和文本特征。由于初始框架仍有改进空间，我们引入了一种分组序列策略优化（GSPO）策略，以进一步挖掘模型的潜力。为缓解强化学习微调期间的训练不稳定问题，我们引入了一种裁剪优势缩放（CAS）的策略来抑制梯度爆炸。此外，我们设计了结构化输出奖励和综合检测奖励，以平衡探索和利用，从而提高目标感知的完整性和准确性。在RefRT数据集上的大量实验表明了所提出的RTrack框架的有效性。

title: Geometry-as-context: Modulating Explicit 3D in Scene-consistent Video Generation to Geometry Context
summary: Scene-consistent video generation aims to create videos that explore 3D scenes based on a camera trajectory. Previous methods rely on video generation models with external memory for consistency, or iterative 3D reconstruction and inpainting, which accumulate errors during inference due to incorrect intermediary outputs, non-differentiable processes, and separate models. To overcome these limitations, we introduce ``geometry-as-context". It iteratively completes the following steps using an autoregressive camera-controlled video generation model: (1) estimates the geometry of the current view necessary for 3D reconstruction, and (2) simulates and restores novel view images rendered by the 3D scene. Under this multi-task framework, we develop the camera gated attention module to enhance the model's capability to effectively leverage camera poses. During the training phase, text contexts are utilized to ascertain whether geometric or RGB images should be generated. To ensure that the model can generate RGB-only outputs during inference, the geometry context is randomly dropped from the interleaved text-image-geometry training sequence. The method has been tested on scene video generation with one-direction and forth-and-back trajectories. The results show its superiority over previous approaches in maintaining scene consistency and camera control.
tldr: This paper introduces "geometry-as-context," a novel approach for scene-consistent video generation that leverages iterative geometry estimation and novel view synthesis within an autoregressive framework, outperforming previous methods in maintaining scene consistency and camera control.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为“geometry-as-context”的新颖场景一致性视频生成方法。该方法在自回归框架内利用迭代几何估计和新视角合成，在保持场景一致性和相机控制方面优于以前的方法。
summary_zh: 场景一致性视频生成旨在创建基于相机轨迹探索3D场景的视频。以往的方法依赖于具有外部存储器的视频生成模型以保持一致性，或者依赖于迭代的3D重建和修复，这些方法由于不正确的中间输出、不可微过程以及分离的模型，在推理过程中会累积误差。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了 “几何即上下文”。它使用一个自回归的相机控制视频生成模型迭代完成以下步骤：（1）估计当前视角重建3D场景所需的几何信息，以及（2）模拟并恢复由3D场景渲染的新视角图像。在这个多任务框架下，我们开发了相机门控注意力模块，以增强模型有效利用相机姿态的能力。在训练阶段，利用文本上下文来确定应生成几何图像还是RGB图像。为了确保模型在推理过程中可以生成仅RGB输出，我们从交错的文本-图像-几何训练序列中随机丢弃几何上下文。该方法已在单向和往返轨迹的场景视频生成中进行了测试。结果表明，该方法在保持场景一致性和相机控制方面优于以往的方法。

title: EndoDDC: Learning Sparse to Dense Reconstruction for Endoscopic Robotic Navigation via Diffusion Depth Completion
summary: Accurate depth estimation plays a critical role in the navigation of endoscopic surgical robots, forming the foundation for 3D reconstruction and safe instrument guidance. Fine-tuning pretrained models heavily relies on endoscopic surgical datasets with precise depth annotations. While existing self-supervised depth estimation techniques eliminate the need for accurate depth annotations, their performance degrades in environments with weak textures and variable lighting, leading to sparse reconstruction with invalid depth estimation. Depth completion using sparse depth maps can mitigate these issues and improve accuracy. Despite the advances in depth completion techniques in general fields, their application in endoscopy remains limited. To overcome these limitations, we propose EndoDDC, an endoscopy depth completion method that integrates images, sparse depth information with depth gradient features, and optimizes depth maps through a diffusion model, addressing the issues of weak texture and light reflection in endoscopic environments. Extensive experiments on two publicly available endoscopy datasets show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art models in both depth accuracy and robustness. This demonstrates the potential of our method to reduce visual errors in complex endoscopic environments. Our code will be released at https://github.com/yinheng-lin/EndoDDC.
tldr: The paper introduces EndoDDC, a diffusion-based depth completion method for endoscopic robotic navigation, addressing the challenges of weak textures and variable lighting in endoscopic environments. It outperforms SOTA methods on public datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了EndoDDC，一种基于扩散模型的内窥镜机器人导航深度补全方法，旨在解决内窥镜环境下弱纹理和可变光照的挑战。该方法在公共数据集上优于现有技术。
summary_zh: 精确的深度估计在内窥镜手术机器人的导航中起着至关重要的作用，是3D重建和安全器械引导的基础。微调预训练模型在很大程度上依赖于带有精确深度标注的内窥镜手术数据集。虽然现有的自监督深度估计技术消除了对精确深度标注的需求，但它们的性能在弱纹理和可变光照的环境中会降低，导致生成具有无效深度估计的稀疏重建。使用稀疏深度图的深度补全可以缓解这些问题并提高精度。尽管通用领域的深度补全技术取得了进展，但其在内窥镜领域的应用仍然有限。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种内窥镜深度补全方法EndoDDC，该方法整合图像、带有深度梯度特征的稀疏深度信息，并通过扩散模型优化深度图，从而解决内窥镜环境中弱纹理和光反射问题。在两个公开可用的内窥镜数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法在深度精度和鲁棒性方面均优于最先进的模型。这证明了我们的方法在降低复杂内窥镜环境中视觉误差方面的潜力。我们的代码将在https://github.com/yinheng-lin/EndoDDC发布。

title: XStreamVGGT: Extremely Memory-Efficient Streaming Vision Geometry Grounded Transformer with KV Cache Compression
summary: Learning-based 3D visual geometry models have significantly advanced with the advent of large-scale transformers. Among these, StreamVGGT leverages frame-wise causal attention to deliver robust and efficient streaming 3D reconstruction. However, it suffers from unbounded growth in the Key-Value (KV) cache due to the massive influx of vision tokens from multi-image and long-video inputs, leading to increased memory consumption and inference latency as input frames accumulate. This ultimately limits its scalability for long-horizon applications. To address this gap, we propose XStreamVGGT, a tuning-free approach that seamlessly integrates pruning and quantization to systematically compress the KV cache, enabling extremely memory-efficient streaming inference. Specifically, redundant KVs generated from multi-frame inputs are initially pruned to conform to a fixed KV memory budget using an efficient token-importance identification mechanism that maintains full compatibility with high-performance attention kernels (e.g., FlashAttention). Additionally, leveraging the inherent distribution patterns of KV tensors, we apply dimension-adaptive KV quantization within the pruning pipeline to further minimize memory overhead while preserving numerical accuracy. Extensive evaluations show that XStreamVGGT achieves mostly negligible performance degradation while substantially reducing memory usage by 4.42$\times$ and accelerating inference by 5.48$\times$, enabling practical and scalable streaming 3D applications. The code is available at https://github.com/ywh187/XStreamVGGT/.
tldr: The paper introduces XStreamVGGT, a method for compressing the Key-Value cache in streaming vision transformers, enabling more memory-efficient and faster 3D reconstruction for long-horizon applications via pruning and quantization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了XStreamVGGT，一种用于压缩流式视觉Transformer中Key-Value缓存的方法，通过剪枝和量化，为长时程应用实现更节省内存和更快速的3D重建。
summary_zh: 基于学习的3D视觉几何模型随着大规模Transformer的出现取得了显著进展。其中，StreamVGGT利用逐帧因果注意力来提供稳健高效的流式3D重建。然而，由于来自多图像和长视频输入的大量视觉Token涌入，它面临着Key-Value（KV）缓存的无限增长问题，导致随着输入帧的累积，内存消耗和推理延迟增加。这最终限制了其在长时程应用中的可扩展性。为了解决这一差距，我们提出XStreamVGGT，一种无需微调的方法，可以无缝集成剪枝和量化来系统地压缩KV缓存，从而实现极高内存效率的流式推理。具体而言，首先使用一种高效的Token重要性识别机制剪枝从多帧输入生成的冗余KV，使其符合固定的KV内存预算，同时保持与高性能注意力内核（例如，FlashAttention）的完全兼容性。此外，利用KV张量固有的分布模式，我们在剪枝流程中应用维度自适应的KV量化，以进一步最大限度地减少内存开销，同时保持数值精度。广泛的评估表明，XStreamVGGT在性能下降几乎可以忽略不计的情况下，显著减少了4.42倍的内存使用量，并将推理速度提高了5.48倍，从而实现了实用且可扩展的流式3D应用。 代码可在https://github.com/ywh187/XStreamVGGT/上获取。

title: Lie Flow: Video Dynamic Fields Modeling and Predicting with Lie Algebra as Geometric Physics Principle
summary: Modeling 4D scenes requires capturing both spatial structure and temporal motion, which is challenging due to the need for physically consistent representations of complex rigid and non-rigid motions. Existing approaches mainly rely on translational displacements, which struggle to represent rotations, articulated transformations, often leading to spatial inconsistency and physically implausible motion. LieFlow, a dynamic radiance representation framework that explicitly models motion within the SE(3) Lie group, enabling coherent learning of translation and rotation in a unified geometric space. The SE(3) transformation field enforces physically inspired constraints to maintain motion continuity and geometric consistency. The evaluation includes a synthetic dataset with rigid-body trajectories and two real-world datasets capturing complex motion under natural lighting and occlusions. Across all datasets, LieFlow consistently improves view-synthesis fidelity, temporal coherence, and physical realism over NeRF-based baselines. These results confirm that SE(3)-based motion modeling offers a robust and physically grounded framework for representing dynamic 4D scenes.
tldr: The paper introduces LieFlow, a novel dynamic radiance field representation framework that uses the SE(3) Lie group to model and predict motion in 4D scenes, achieving improved view synthesis fidelity, temporal coherence, and physical realism compared to NeRF baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LieFlow，一种新的动态辐射场表示框架，它使用SE(3)李群来建模和预测4D场景中的运动，与NeRF基线相比，实现了更好的视图合成保真度、时间一致性和物理真实感。
summary_zh: 对4D场景进行建模需要捕捉空间结构和时间运动，这具有挑战性，因为需要对复杂刚性和非刚性运动进行物理一致的表示。现有方法主要依赖平移位移，难以表示旋转、铰接变换，且经常导致空间不一致和物理上不合理的运动。LieFlow是一种动态辐射表示框架，它在SE(3)李群中显式地对运动进行建模，从而能够在统一的几何空间中连贯地学习平移和旋转。SE(3)变换场强制执行受物理启发的约束，以维持运动的连续性和几何一致性。评估包括一个带有刚体轨迹的合成数据集和两个在自然光照和遮挡下捕捉复杂运动的真实世界数据集。在所有数据集上，与基于NeRF的基线相比，LieFlow始终如一地提高了视图合成的保真度、时间连贯性和物理真实感。这些结果证实，基于SE(3)的运动建模为表示动态4D场景提供了一个稳健且具有物理基础的框架。

title: Which Tool Response Should I Trust? Tool-Expertise-Aware Chest X-ray Agent with Multimodal Agentic Learning
summary: AI agents with tool-use capabilities show promise for integrating the domain expertise of various tools. In the medical field, however, tools are usually AI models that are inherently error-prone and can produce contradictory responses. Existing research on medical agents lacks sufficient understanding of the tools' realistic reliability and thus cannot effectively resolve tool conflicts. To address this gap, this paper introduces a framework that enables an agent to interact with tools and empirically learn their practical trustworthiness across different types of multimodal queries via agentic learning. As a concrete instantiation, we focus on chest X-ray analysis and present a tool-expertise-aware chest X-ray agent (TEA-CXA). When tool outputs disagree, the agent experimentally accepts or rejects multimodal tool results, receives rewards, and learns which tool to trust for each query type. Importantly, TEA-CXA extends existing codebases for reinforcement learning with multi-turn tool-calling that focus on textual inputs, to support multimodal contexts effectively. In addition, we enhance the codebase for medical use scenarios by supporting multiple tool calls in one turn, parallel tool inference, and multi-image accommodation within a single user query. Our code framework is applicable to general medical research on multi-turn tool-calling reinforcement learning in multimodal settings. Experiments show that TEA-CXA outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and a comprehensive set of baselines. Code will be released.
tldr: The paper introduces a tool-expertise-aware agent (TEA-CXA) for chest X-ray analysis that uses reinforcement learning to learn which AI tools to trust based on the query type, outperforming existing methods in multimodal, multi-turn tool-calling scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种工具专家感知型 Agent (TEA-CXA)，用于胸部 X 光分析。该 Agent 使用强化学习根据查询类型学习信任哪些 AI 工具，并在多模态、多轮工具调用的场景中优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 具备工具使用能力的人工智能智能体展现了整合各种工具领域专业知识的潜力。然而，在医学领域，工具通常本身就是易于出错且可能产生矛盾响应的人工智能模型。现有的医学智能体研究缺乏对工具实际可靠性的充分理解，因此无法有效地解决工具冲突。为了弥补这一差距，本文介绍了一个框架，该框架允许智能体与工具交互，并通过智能体学习在不同类型的多模态查询中凭经验学习它们的实际可信度。作为一个具体实例，我们专注于胸部X光分析，并提出了一个工具专业知识感知的胸部X光智能体 (TEA-CXA)。当工具输出不一致时，智能体会实验性地接受或拒绝多模态工具结果，接收奖励，并学习为每种查询类型信任哪个工具。重要的是，TEA-CXA扩展了现有的强化学习代码库，该代码库侧重于文本输入的多轮工具调用，以有效地支持多模态上下文。此外，我们通过支持一轮中的多次工具调用、并行工具推理以及单个用户查询中的多图像容纳，来增强用于医疗使用场景的代码库。我们的代码框架适用于多模态环境中多轮工具调用强化学习的一般医学研究。实验表明，TEA-CXA优于最先进的方法和一系列全面的基线。代码将被发布。

title: Unified Unsupervised and Sparsely-Supervised 3D Object Detection by Semantic Pseudo-Labeling and Prototype Learning
summary: 3D object detection is essential for autonomous driving and robotic perception, yet its reliance on large-scale manually annotated data limits scalability and adaptability. To reduce annotation dependency, unsupervised and sparsely-supervised paradigms have emerged. However, they face intertwined challenges: low-quality pseudo-labels, unstable feature mining, and a lack of a unified training framework. This paper proposes SPL, a unified training framework for both Unsupervised and Sparsely-Supervised 3D Object Detection via Semantic Pseudo-labeling and prototype Learning. SPL first generates high-quality pseudo-labels by integrating image semantics, point cloud geometry, and temporal cues, producing both 3D bounding boxes for dense objects and 3D point labels for sparse ones. These pseudo-labels are not used directly but as probabilistic priors within a novel, multi-stage prototype learning strategy. This strategy stabilizes feature representation learning through memory-based initialization and momentum-based prototype updating, effectively mining features from both labeled and unlabeled data. Extensive experiments on KITTI and nuScenes datasets demonstrate that SPL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both settings. Our work provides a robust and generalizable solution for learning 3D object detectors with minimal or no manual annotations.
tldr: This paper introduces SPL, a unified framework for unsupervised and sparsely-supervised 3D object detection using semantic pseudo-labeling and prototype learning, achieving state-of-the-art results on KITTI and nuScenes datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为SPL的统一框架，该框架通过语义伪标签和原型学习来进行无监督和稀疏监督的3D目标检测，并在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 3D目标检测对于自动驾驶和机器人感知至关重要，但其对大规模手动标注数据的依赖限制了可扩展性和适应性。为了减少对标注的依赖，无监督和稀疏监督范式应运而生。然而，它们面临着相互交织的挑战：低质量的伪标签、不稳定的特征挖掘以及缺乏统一的训练框架。本文提出SPL，一种通过语义伪标签和原型学习实现无监督和稀疏监督3D目标检测的统一训练框架。SPL首先通过整合图像语义、点云几何结构和时间线索生成高质量的伪标签，为密集对象生成3D边界框，为稀疏对象生成3D点标签。这些伪标签不被直接使用，而是作为一种新型多阶段原型学习策略中的概率先验。该策略通过基于内存的初始化和基于动量的原型更新来稳定特征表示学习，从而有效地从已标注和未标注数据中挖掘特征。在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上的大量实验表明，SPL在这两种设置下均显著优于最先进的方法。我们的工作为使用最少或没有手动标注学习3D目标检测器提供了一种鲁棒且可泛化的解决方案。

title: Human Video Generation from a Single Image with 3D Pose and View Control
summary: Recent diffusion methods have made significant progress in generating videos from single images due to their powerful visual generation capabilities. However, challenges persist in image-to-video synthesis, particularly in human video generation, where inferring view-consistent, motion-dependent clothing wrinkles from a single image remains a formidable problem. In this paper, we present Human Video Generation in 4D (HVG), a latent video diffusion model capable of generating high-quality, multi-view, spatiotemporally coherent human videos from a single image with 3D pose and view control. HVG achieves this through three key designs: (i) Articulated Pose Modulation, which captures the anatomical relationships of 3D joints via a novel dual-dimensional bone map and resolves self-occlusions across views by introducing 3D information; (ii) View and Temporal Alignment, which ensures multi-view consistency and alignment between a reference image and pose sequences for frame-to-frame stability; and (iii) Progressive Spatio-Temporal Sampling with temporal alignment to maintain smooth transitions in long multi-view animations. Extensive experiments on image-to-video tasks demonstrate that HVG outperforms existing methods in generating high-quality 4D human videos from diverse human images and pose inputs.
tldr: The paper introduces HVG, a latent video diffusion model for generating high-quality, multi-view, spatiotemporally coherent human videos from a single image with 3D pose and view control, addressing challenges in view-consistent and motion-dependent clothing wrinkle generation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了HVG，一种潜在的视频扩散模型，用于从单个图像生成高质量、多视角、时空一致的人类视频，并通过3D姿势和视角控制，解决了视角一致和运动相关的服装褶皱生成方面的挑战。
summary_zh: 近年来，扩散方法凭借其强大的视觉生成能力，在从单张图像生成视频方面取得了显著进展。然而，图像到视频的合成仍然面临挑战，尤其是在人体视频生成方面，如何从单张图像推断出视角一致、运动相关的服装褶皱仍然是一个巨大的难题。本文提出了一种4D人体视频生成方法（HVG），这是一种潜在视频扩散模型，能够从单张图像生成高质量、多视角、时空一致的人体视频，同时支持3D姿势和视角控制。HVG通过以下三个关键设计实现这一目标：（i）铰接姿势调制，它通过一种新颖的双维度骨骼图捕捉3D关节的解剖关系，并通过引入3D信息来解决跨视角的自遮挡问题；（ii）视角和时间对齐，确保多视角一致性以及参考图像和姿势序列之间的对齐，从而保证帧与帧之间的稳定性；（iii）具有时间对齐的渐进式时空采样，以维持长时间多视角动画中的平滑过渡。在图像到视频任务上的大量实验表明，HVG在从各种人体图像和姿势输入生成高质量4D人体视频方面优于现有方法。

title: BrepCoder: A Unified Multimodal Large Language Model for Multi-task B-rep Reasoning
summary: Recent advancements in deep learning have actively addressed complex challenges within the Computer-Aided Design (CAD) domain.However, most existing approaches rely on task-specifi c models requiring structural modifi cations for new tasks, and they predominantly focus on point clouds or images rather than the industry-standard Boundary Representation (B-rep) format. To address these limitations, we propose BrepCoder, a unifi ed Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) that performs diverse CAD tasks from B-rep inputs. By leveraging the code generation capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), we convert CAD modeling sequences into Python-like code and align them with B-rep. We then adopt a two-stage training strategy: First, pre-training on reverse engineering to learn geometric features and design logic. Second, eff ectively extending the model to various downstream tasks such as completion, error correction, and CAD-QA. Consequently, by interpreting B-rep as structural code, BrepCoder achieves superior generalization across diverse tasks, demonstrating its potential as a general-purpose CAD agent.
tldr: BrepCoder is a unified MLLM that uses the code generation capabilities of LLMs to perform diverse CAD tasks from B-rep inputs, trained through a two-stage process for reverse engineering and downstream task adaptation.
tldr_zh: BrepCoder是一个统一的多模态大语言模型，利用LLM的代码生成能力，从B-rep输入中执行各种CAD任务，通过两阶段过程进行训练，以进行逆向工程和下游任务适配。
summary_zh: 深度学习的最新进展已积极应对计算机辅助设计（CAD）领域内的复杂挑战。然而，大多数现有方法依赖于特定任务模型，需要针对新任务进行结构性修改，并且它们主要关注点云或图像，而不是行业标准的边界表示（B-rep）格式。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了BrepCoder，一个统一的多模态大型语言模型（MLLM），可以从B-rep输入执行各种CAD任务。通过利用大型语言模型（LLM）的代码生成能力，我们将CAD建模序列转换为类Python代码，并将它们与B-rep对齐。然后，我们采用两阶段训练策略：首先，进行逆向工程的预训练，以学习几何特征和设计逻辑；其次，有效地将模型扩展到各种下游任务，例如补全、错误纠正和CAD问答。因此，通过将B-rep解释为结构化代码，BrepCoder在各种任务中实现了卓越的泛化能力，展示了其作为通用CAD代理的潜力。

title: Hierarchical Lead Critic based Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) solves complex tasks that require coordination from multiple agents, but is often limited to either local (independent learning) or global (centralized learning) perspectives. In this paper, we introduce a novel sequential training scheme and MARL architecture, which learns from multiple perspectives on different hierarchy levels. We propose the Hierarchical Lead Critic (HLC) - inspired by natural emerging distributions in team structures, where following high-level objectives combines with low-level execution. HLC demonstrates that introducing multiple hierarchies, leveraging local and global perspectives, can lead to improved performance with high sample efficiency and robust policies. Experimental results conducted on cooperative, non-communicative, and partially observable MARL benchmarks demonstrate that HLC outperforms single hierarchy baselines and scales robustly with increasing amounts of agents and difficulty.
tldr: The paper introduces Hierarchical Lead Critic (HLC), a novel MARL architecture with a sequential training scheme that leverages multiple hierarchical perspectives to improve performance, sample efficiency, and robustness in cooperative tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型的MARL架构，即分层领导评论家（HLC），它采用顺序训练方案，利用多个分层视角，从而提高合作任务中的性能、样本效率和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 合作式多智能体强化学习（MARL）旨在解决需要多个智能体协同完成的复杂任务，但通常局限于局部（独立学习）或全局（中心化学习）的视角。本文提出了一种新颖的顺序训练方案和MARL架构，该架构从不同层级上的多个视角进行学习。我们提出了分层领导评论家（HLC），其灵感来源于团队结构中自然涌现的分布，将高层目标与低层执行相结合。HLC证明了引入多个层级，利用局部和全局视角，可以提高性能，同时实现高样本效率和鲁棒策略。在合作式、非通信和部分可观测的MARL基准测试中进行的实验结果表明，HLC优于单层级基线，并且能够随着智能体数量和难度的增加而稳健地扩展。

title: UNet-Based Keypoint Regression for 3D Cone Localization in Autonomous Racing
summary: Accurate cone localization in 3D space is essential in autonomous racing for precise navigation around the track. Approaches that rely on traditional computer vision algorithms are sensitive to environmental variations, and neural networks are often trained on limited data and are infeasible to run in real time. We present a UNet-based neural network for keypoint detection on cones, leveraging the largest custom-labeled dataset we have assembled. Our approach enables accurate cone position estimation and the potential for color prediction. Our model achieves substantial improvements in keypoint accuracy over conventional methods. Furthermore, we leverage our predicted keypoints in the perception pipeline and evaluate the end-to-end autonomous system. Our results show high-quality performance across all metrics, highlighting the effectiveness of this approach and its potential for adoption in competitive autonomous racing systems.
tldr: This paper presents a UNet-based keypoint detection method for 3D cone localization in autonomous racing, claiming improvements in accuracy and real-world applicability using a custom-labeled dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于UNet的关键点检测方法，用于自动驾驶赛车中3D锥桶的定位，声称通过使用自定义标签数据集实现了精度和实际应用性的提高。
summary_zh: 在自主赛车中，精准的锥桶三维空间定位对于赛道上的精确导航至关重要。 依赖传统计算机视觉算法的方法对环境变化敏感，而神经网络通常在有限的数据上训练，并且难以实时运行。 我们提出了一种基于UNet的神经网络，用于锥桶上的关键点检测，它利用了我们组装的最大的自定义标记数据集。 我们的方法能实现准确的锥桶位置估计和潜在的颜色预测。 我们的模型在关键点精度方面比传统方法取得了显著的改进。 此外，我们将预测的关键点应用于感知流水线，并评估端到端自主系统。 我们的结果表明，在所有指标上都表现出高质量的性能，突出了这种方法的有效性及其在竞争性自主赛车系统中采用的潜力。

title: Biomechanical Comparisons Reveal Divergence of Human and Humanoid Gaits
summary: It remains challenging to achieve human-like locomotion in legged robots due to fundamental discrepancies between biological and mechanical structures. Although imitation learning has emerged as a promising approach for generating natural robotic movements, simply replicating joint angle trajectories fails to capture the underlying principles of human motion. This study proposes a Gait Divergence Analysis Framework (GDAF), a unified biomechanical evaluation framework that systematically quantifies kinematic and kinetic discrepancies between humans and bipedal robots. We apply GDAF to systematically compare human and humanoid locomotion across 28 walking speeds. To enable reproducible analysis, we collect and release a speed-continuous humanoid locomotion dataset from a state-of-the-art humanoid controller. We further provide an open-source implementation of GDAF, including analysis, visualization, and MuJoCo-based tools, enabling quantitative, interpretable, and reproducible biomechanical analysis of humanoid locomotion. Results demonstrate that despite visually human-like motion generated by modern humanoid controllers, significant biomechanical divergence persists across speeds. Robots exhibit systematic deviations in gait symmetry, energy distribution, and joint coordination, indicating that substantial room remains for improving the biomechanical fidelity and energetic efficiency of humanoid locomotion. This work provides a quantitative benchmark for evaluating humanoid locomotion and offers data and versatile tools to support the development of more human-like and energetically efficient locomotion controllers. The data and code will be made publicly available upon acceptance of the paper.
tldr: This paper introduces a Gait Divergence Analysis Framework (GDAF) to quantify biomechanical differences between human and humanoid locomotion, revealing significant discrepancies despite visually similar motion and providing a benchmark dataset and open-source tools for future research.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种步态差异分析框架（GDAF），用于量化人和人形机器人运动之间的生物力学差异。研究表明，尽管视觉上相似，但二者差异显著。此外，论文还提供了一个基准数据集和开源工具，以供未来研究使用。
summary_zh: 由于生物和机械结构之间的根本差异，在腿式机器人中实现类人运动仍然具有挑战性。虽然模仿学习已成为生成自然机器人运动的一种有前景的方法，但简单地复制关节角度轨迹无法捕捉人类运动的深层原理。本研究提出了一种步态差异分析框架（GDAF），一个统一的生物力学评估框架，旨在系统地量化人类和双足机器人之间的运动学和动力学差异。我们应用GDAF系统地比较了28种行走速度下的人类和类人机器人运动。为了实现可重复的分析，我们收集并发布了一个来自最先进的类人控制器的高速连续类人运动数据集。我们进一步提供GDAF的开源实现，包括分析、可视化和基于MuJoCo的工具，从而实现对类人机器人运动进行定量、可解释和可重复的生物力学分析。结果表明，尽管现代类人控制器产生了视觉上类人的运动，但在不同速度下仍然存在显著的生物力学差异。机器人在步态对称性、能量分布和关节协调方面表现出系统性的偏差，表明在提高类人机器人运动的生物力学保真度和能量效率方面仍有很大的改进空间。这项工作为评估类人机器人运动提供了一个定量基准，并提供数据和通用工具来支持开发更像人类和更节能的运动控制器。数据和代码将在论文被接受后公开。

title: DAGS-SLAM: Dynamic-Aware 3DGS SLAM via Spatiotemporal Motion Probability and Uncertainty-Aware Scheduling
summary: Mobile robots and IoT devices demand real-time localization and dense reconstruction under tight compute and energy budgets. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables efficient dense SLAM, dynamic objects and occlusions still degrade tracking and mapping. Existing dynamic 3DGS-SLAM often relies on heavy optical flow and per-frame segmentation, which is costly for mobile deployment and brittle under challenging illumination. We present DAGS-SLAM, a dynamic-aware 3DGS-SLAM system that maintains a spatiotemporal motion probability (MP) state per Gaussian and triggers semantics on demand via an uncertainty-aware scheduler. DAGS-SLAM fuses lightweight YOLO instance priors with geometric cues to estimate and temporally update MP, propagates MP to the front-end for dynamic-aware correspondence selection, and suppresses dynamic artifacts in the back-end via MP-guided optimization. Experiments on public dynamic RGB-D benchmarks show improved reconstruction and robust tracking while sustaining real-time throughput on a commodity GPU, demonstrating a practical speed-accuracy tradeoff with reduced semantic invocations toward mobile deployment.
tldr: DAGS-SLAM introduces a dynamic-aware 3DGS SLAM system that uses spatiotemporal motion probability and uncertainty-aware scheduling to improve reconstruction and tracking in dynamic environments while maintaining real-time performance on commodity hardware.
tldr_zh: DAGS-SLAM 提出了一种动态感知的三维高斯溅射 (3DGS) SLAM 系统，该系统利用时空运动概率和不确定性感知调度来改善动态环境中的重建和跟踪，同时在通用硬件上保持实时性能。
summary_zh: 移动机器人和物联网设备需要在严格的计算和能源预算下实现实时定位和稠密重建。虽然3D高斯溅射（3DGS）实现了高效的稠密SLAM，但动态物体和遮挡仍然会降低跟踪和建图的性能。现有的动态3DGS-SLAM通常依赖于繁重的光流和逐帧分割，这对于移动部署而言成本高昂，并且在具有挑战性的光照条件下容易出错。我们提出了DAGS-SLAM，一种动态感知的3DGS-SLAM系统，该系统为每个高斯维持一个时空运动概率（MP）状态，并通过一个不确定性感知的调度器按需触发语义信息。DAGS-SLAM融合了轻量级的YOLO实例先验和几何线索来估计并随时间更新MP，将MP传播到前端以进行动态感知的对应关系选择，并在后端通过MP引导的优化来抑制动态伪影。在公共的动态RGB-D基准数据集上的实验表明，在保持商品GPU上的实时吞吐量的同时，重建效果得到改善，跟踪更加鲁棒，从而展示了一种实际的速度-精度权衡，并减少了语义调用的次数，有利于移动部署。

title: Environment-Aware Learning of Smooth GNSS Covariance Dynamics for Autonomous Racing
summary: Ensuring accurate and stable state estimation is a challenging task crucial to safety-critical domains such as high-speed autonomous racing, where measurement uncertainty must be both adaptive to the environment and temporally smooth for control. In this work, we develop a learning-based framework, LACE, capable of directly modeling the temporal dynamics of GNSS measurement covariance. We model the covariance evolution as an exponentially stable dynamical system where a deep neural network (DNN) learns to predict the system's process noise from environmental features through an attention mechanism. By using contraction-based stability and systematically imposing spectral constraints, we formally provide guarantees of exponential stability and smoothness for the resulting covariance dynamics. We validate our approach on an AV-24 autonomous racecar, demonstrating improved localization performance and smoother covariance estimates in challenging, GNSS-degraded environments. Our results highlight the promise of dynamically modeling the perceived uncertainty in state estimation problems that are tightly coupled with control sensitivity.
tldr: The paper presents a learning-based framework (LACE) for modeling the temporal dynamics of GNSS measurement covariance in autonomous racing, ensuring stable and smooth state estimation even in challenging environments by using a deep neural network and contraction-based stability guarantees.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于学习的框架 (LACE)，用于模拟自动驾驶赛车中 GNSS 测量协方差的时间动态特性，通过使用深度神经网络和基于收缩的稳定性保证，即使在具有挑战性的环境中也能确保稳定平滑的状态估计。
summary_zh: 确保准确且稳定的状态估计是一项具有挑战性的任务，对于高速自动驾驶等安全关键领域至关重要，因为在这些领域中，测量不确定性必须既能适应环境，又能随时间平滑变化以服务于控制。 在这项工作中，我们开发了一种基于学习的框架 LACE，能够直接对 GNSS 测量协方差的时间动态特性进行建模。 我们将协方差演化建模为一个指数稳定的动力学系统，其中一个深度神经网络 (DNN) 学习通过注意力机制从环境特征中预测系统的过程噪声。 通过使用基于压缩的稳定性方法并系统地施加谱约束，我们正式保证了所得协方差动态的指数稳定性和平滑性。 我们在 AV-24 自动驾驶赛车上验证了我们的方法，证明在具有挑战性的、GNSS 退化的环境中，定位性能得到改善，协方差估计更加平滑。 我们的结果突出了在与控制敏感性紧密耦合的状态估计问题中，对感知不确定性进行动态建模的前景。
